title: YouTube Poop: Marijuana-Laced Toast
description:
Honors:
#55 Top Rated (Today) - Travel & Places (Lawl)
#60 Most Discussed (Today) - Travel & Places (Moar Lawl)
#29 Top Favorites (Today) - Travel & Places (Evn Moar Lawl)
#39 Most Linked (Today) - Travel & Places (Stil Moar Lawl)

-------------------------------
Mario accidentally downs some Marijuana-laced toast, and thinks he fell into a pipe, and starts hallucinating that he sees fat weathermen on tire-swings.

Featuring special guests.

Clips that appear:

- Hotel Mario
- Family Guy (Normally I can't stand Family Guy, but I had to put Ollie Williams in somewhere.)
- Mario Brothers 3
- Tunak Tunak Tan
- Strong Bad E-Mail
- Mega Man OAV
- Josh & Taylor

This is also the first one I've made to include an intro. I dunno if I'm gonna keep that for terribly long or not, though.
